steps.title: Mark award sequence
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize order. Gordon W. Hale won in 1992, and Maya Chen won in 2011, so the sentence should make the later award explicit.

steps.title: Prefer explicit order language
steps.content: B mentions only Hale, C gives no years or order, and D gives both years but does not emphasize the sequence as directly. The matching choice names the earlier winner first and marks Chen's win as later. The answer is A.
